title: setRepeat()
text: setRepeat() Set the repeat count for the UTIMER component. Explain this code operation setRepeat params numeric Count : IN endparams Copy Parameters Count —integer that specifies how many times the current instance of the UTIMER component will send its message. 0 indicates unlimited repetition. The default is 1 . Return Values The value returned in $status is always 0 . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The setRepeat() operation sets the repeat count for the current instance of the UTIMER component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
